name: Kwik Trip #250 - Austin Travel Center
description: Truck stop at I-90 Exit 179 (US-218) in Austin with diesel, about 35 truck spaces, showers, laundry, a truck wash, truckers lounge and a CAT Scale (former Austin Travel Center converted to Kwik Trip).

name: CAT Scale at Kwik Trip Austin
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Kwik Trip truck stop at I-90 Exit 179 (US-218) in Austin.

name: Windmill Travel Center
description: Independent travel plaza at I-90 Exit 193 (MN-16) in Dexter with diesel, truck parking, a restaurant/deli, store, showers, laundromat and lounge.

name: Kwik Trip #689 - Stewartville
description: Kwik Trip with diesel just off I-90 Exit 209A (US-63/MN-30) in Stewartville, about 10 mi south of Rochester; convenience-store fueling rather than a full truck stop.

name: Casey's General Store - Stewartville
description: Casey's with diesel near the I-90/US-63 interchange (Exit 209) in Stewartville with convenience-store fueling and food; no dedicated truck parking.

name: Kwik Trip #614 - La Crescent
description: Kwik Trip in La Crescent near I-90 Exit 275 (US-14/US-61) close to the Wisconsin line; an in-town convenience store with fuel rather than a full truck stop.

name: High Forest Rest Area
description: MnDOT safety rest area on eastbound I-90 at milepost 202 (near High Forest, about 7 mi west of the Stewartville exit) with restrooms, a picnic area and a truck parking lot.

name: Dresbach Welcome Center (Travel Information Center)
description: MnDOT welcome center/rest area on westbound I-90 at MM 276 near the Wisconsin line (Mississippi River/Dresbach), with restrooms, a 24/7 brochure lobby, staffed travel counselors and truck/RV parking overlooking Lock & Dam #7.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Rochester
description: Commercial/OTR truck tire dealer in Rochester (nearest I-90 access via US-52 Exit 218) offering 24-hour roadside truck tire service to the I-90 corridor; the store itself is in Rochester, not directly on I-90.

name: SAC Towing & Recovery
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing and recovery based in Stewartville (I-90 Exit 209), serving I-90, US-52, US-63 and SE Minnesota including Rochester and Cannon Falls.

name: Rapid Roadside & Repair
description: 24/7 mobile heavy-duty truck and trailer repair and roadside tire service based in Rochester (nearest I-90 access via US-52 Exit 218), serving Rochester, Austin, Stewartville, Byron and Kasson along I-90.
